name: vultisig-sdk
description: Vultisig MPC wallet SDK — secure multi-chain crypto operations with threshold signing across 40+ blockchains.

functions.name: create_fast_vault
functions.description: Create a server-assisted 2-of-2 MPC vault for autonomous operations. Returns a vault ID; call verify_vault with the emailed code to activate.

email.description: Email address for verification code delivery

functions.name: verify_vault
functions.description: Verify a pending vault with the email verification code. Activates the vault and returns a usable FastVault instance.

functions.name: get_address
functions.description: Derive a blockchain address from the vault's MPC keys for a specific chain.

functions.name: get_addresses
functions.description: Derive addresses for multiple chains at once. Defaults to all active chains if none specified.

chains.description: Chain names. Omit for all active chains.

returns.description: Map of chain name to address string

functions.name: get_balance
functions.description: Query the balance of a native token or specific token on a chain.

token_id.description: Token contract address. Omit for native token.

functions.name: get_balances
functions.description: Query balances across multiple chains. Defaults to all active chains.

chains.description: Chain names. Omit for all active chains.

include_tokens.description: Include custom token balances. Default false.

returns.description: Map of chain name to Balance object

functions.name: get_total_value
functions.description: Get total portfolio value across all active chains and tokens in fiat.

fiat_currency.description: Fiat currency code (e.g. 'USD', 'EUR'). Defaults to vault currency.

functions.name: estimate_gas
functions.description: Get current gas prices and fee estimates for a chain.

returns.description: Chain-specific gas info (EvmGasInfo, UtxoGasInfo, or CosmosGasInfo)

functions.name: prepare_send_tx
functions.description: Build an unsigned transaction for sending native tokens or ERC-20 tokens. Returns a KeysignPayload for signing.

coin.description: AccountCoin with chain, address, decimals, ticker

amountBaseUnits.description: Amount in base units as bigint string (e.g. '1000000000000000000' for 1 ETH)

functions.name: sign
functions.description: Sign a prepared transaction using MPC threshold signing. For FastVaults, this coordinates with VultiServer automatically.

functions.name: broadcast_tx
functions.description: Broadcast a signed transaction to the blockchain.

functions.name: get_swap_quote
functions.description: Get a swap quote between two tokens, potentially across chains. Routes through THORChain, MayaChain, 1inch, LiFi, or KyberSwap.

from_coin.description: Source token. Use { chain: 'Ethereum' } for native ETH, or { chain: 'Ethereum', token: '0x...' } for ERC-20.

token.description: Token contract address. Omit for native.

returns.description: SwapQuoteResult with provider, estimated output, fees, and approval info

functions.name: prepare_swap_tx
functions.description: Build unsigned transaction(s) for a swap. May return an approval transaction for ERC-20 tokens in addition to the swap transaction.

returns.description: SwapPrepareResult with keysignPayload, optional approvalPayload, and quote

functions.name: import_vault
functions.description: Import a vault from a .vult backup file.

password.description: Decryption password. Required for encrypted vaults.

functions.name: export_vault
functions.description: Export a vault to a .vult backup file.

password.description: Encryption password. Omit for unencrypted export.

functions.name: validate_seedphrase
functions.description: Validate a BIP39 mnemonic seedphrase. Supports 10 languages.

functions.name: create_fast_vault_from_seedphrase
functions.description: Create a FastVault by importing an existing seedphrase. Optionally discovers chains with existing balances.

discover_chains.description: Auto-discover chains with balances. Default false.

returns.description: Vault ID. Call verify_vault to activate.

functions.name: list_vaults
functions.description: List all stored vaults.

functions.name: get_tx_explorer_url
functions.description: Get block explorer URL for a transaction hash.

functions.name: get_server_status
functions.description: Check connectivity to VultiServer (fast signing) and Message Relay (secure signing).
